Off Calendar May-17-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-28-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-18-2018 Off Calendar

MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion For Order Permitting Discovery Of Enrique Rodriguez' Profits And Financial Condition; Memorandum In Support; Declaration Of Kiran Umapathy
Off Calendar May-01-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Joseph W. Strella, Jr., Esq. of Clapp Moroney Vucinich Beeman Scheley, Tel. 650.989.5400, appearing for defendant/opposing party Enrique Rodriguez,
No appearance by any party or counsel.

Defense stipulates to the matter being heard by Judge Pro Tem Bruce Highman.

There being no other appearance, the tentative ruling on Plaintiffs Kiran Umapathy, Jenny Kondrasky, and Bradley Walden's Motion For Order Permitting Discovery Of Enrique Rodriguez' Profits And Financial Condition is adopted as follows: Denied. To obtain financial discovery before trial for purposes of punitives, plaintiffs must show there is a strong likelihood the jury will award punitives. It is not enough to show the jury might award punitives. The court does not find that plaintiffs have met this very tough standard. Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Bruce Highman, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter Not Reported. =(302/JPT/RBU)
